Two large round eyes are drawn in black with small blue highlights, and a small black nose mark and a short line for a mouth are visible. A vertical black line runs down along the left side of the face.

Setting:

The drawing uses thin black outlines for the head and facial features. The eyes are black with light blue/teal circular highlights, giving a bright accent. The face includes subtle blue coloring near the left side and under parts of the eye area, while the rest is white with black linework. The camera angle is a front-facing, flat 2D view, with the cartoon occupying the center-left of the frame.

No important visible text detected.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
